mapper.select: select t1.* , t2.orgn_nm from esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id and t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.write_year = #{writeYear} order by t1.use_yn desc, t1.created_at desc
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
insert into esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, orgn_id, audit_schedule1, audit_schedule2, audit_schedule3, audit_schedule4, audit_schedule5, audit_schedule6, audit_schedule7, audit_schedule8, audit_schedule9, audit_schedule10, audit_schedule11, audit_schedule12, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{orgnId}, #{auditSchedule1}, #{auditSchedule2}, #{auditSchedule3}, #{auditSchedule4}, #{auditSchedule5}, #{auditSchedule6}, #{auditSchedule7}, #{auditSchedule8}, #{auditSchedule9}, #{auditSchedule10}, #{auditSchedule11}, #{auditSchedule12}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: update esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan set orgn_id = #{orgnId}, audit_schedule1 = #{auditSchedule1}, audit_schedule2 = #{auditSchedule2}, audit_schedule3 = #{auditSchedule3}, audit_schedule4 = #{auditSchedule4}, audit_schedule5 = #{auditSchedule5}, audit_schedule6 = #{auditSchedule6}, audit_schedule7 = #{auditSchedule7}, audit_schedule8 = #{auditSchedule8}, audit_schedule9 = #{auditSchedule9}, audit_schedule10 = #{auditSchedule10}, audit_schedule11 = #{auditSchedule11}, audit_schedule12 = #{auditSchedule12}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
mapper.insert: insert into esg.tb_annual_ohs_internal_audit_plan_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, month, remark, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{month}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
